# services.woodpecker-agents

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.woodpecker-agents`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.woodpecker-agents.agents` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | woodpecker-agents configurations |
| `services.woodpecker-agents.agents.<name>.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable this Woodpecker-Agent. Agents execute tasks generated by a Server, every install will need one server and at least one agent. |
| `services.woodpecker-agents.agents.<name>.environment` | `attribute set of string` | woodpecker-agent config environment variables, for other options read the [documentation](https://woodpecker-ci.org/docs/administration/configuration/agent) |
| `services.woodpecker-agents.agents.<name>.environmentFile` | `list of absolute path` | File to load environment variables from. This is helpful for specifying secrets. Example content of environmentFile: `WOODPECKER_AGENT_SECRET=your-shared-secret-goes-here` |
| `services.woodpecker-agents.agents.<name>.extraGroups` | `list of string` | Additional groups for the systemd service. |
| `services.woodpecker-agents.agents.<name>.package` | `package` | The woodpecker-agent package to use. |
| `services.woodpecker-agents.agents.<name>.path` | `list of package` | Additional packages that should be added to the agent's `PATH`. Mostly useful for the `local` backend. |
